title: Pine64 launch $50 smart speaker for Home Assistant tinkerers
summary: Pine64 发布了一款售价 50 美元的 RISC-V 智能音箱，专为 Home Assistant 爱好者设计。
translated_summary: Pine64 launches a $50 RISC-V smart speaker tailored for Home Assistant enthusiasts, offering an open-source alternative for smart home tinkering.
